query: UPDATE transactions t JOIN transaction_notes n ON n.transactionId = t.id AND n.content LIKE 'Termination reason:%' SET t.terminationReason = SUBSTRING(n.content, 22) WHERE t.status = 'terminated' AND t.terminationReason IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2stQR1ySY2c4Vud.1719b3382959 --database RGtcxHR8RPxZsqyxZLCcuq --execute UPDATE transactions t JOIN transaction_notes n ON n.transactionId = t.id AND n.content LIKE 'Termination reason:%' SET t.terminationReason = SUBSTRING(n.content, 22) WHERE t.status = 'terminated' AND t.terminationReason IS NULL;
